description: Style NotePerfect for style and comfort, this shirt from spykar is sure to quickly elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Crafted from cotton fabric, it offers exemplary comfort. Team it with formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and suede shoes for a semi-formal touch.Product DetailsTeal blue shirt, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned tabs on the shoulders, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separatelyDo not iron on prints and embellishmentsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
